components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #1B4079; color: #fff; padding: 12px 32px; border-radius: 9999px; font-weight: 800; font-size: 14px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.24em; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #122f64; transform: scale(1.03); }

components.name: Feature Card
components.html:
Discovery

Browse grant opportunities and filter by requirements.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #F4F9E2cc; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); border: 1px solid #7F9C9633; border-radius: 32px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-eyebrow { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.34em; color: #334155; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-card-text { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; color: #334155; }

narrative.overview: TANGLAW's design system provides clarity and hope through vibrant nature-inspired palettes and organic shapes. It balances professional weight with academic warmth.
keyCharacteristics: Organic Precision in typography and spacing
Guiding Motion to lead the user's eye

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: The Deep Marine primary is used sparingly on the canvas to ensure critical CTAs command attention.

rules.name: The Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Every major section is preceded by a high-tracking, uppercase eyebrow label for context.

dos: Do use uppercase with high tracking for short labels.
Do use Verdant Sage as the primary background.
donts: Don't use sharp corners; minimum 8px radius.
Don't use pure black or grey for text.
